meaning: adj.肉欲的,色情的,世俗的,感觉的,感觉论的
examples: He was a very sensual person.
It was an opera, very glamorous and very sensual.
The book brings a sensual pleasure.
We are warm, slow, and sensual guys, not like the cold fishes of the north.
They make up for their modest technical gifts with a soft, breathy, sensual sound and persona.
